SessionStart.command: echo '=== Meepliton session start ===' && git branch --show-current && git status --short && echo '--- Unpushed commits ---' && git log origin/$(git branch --show-current)..HEAD --oneline 2>/dev/null || echo '(none)'

PostToolUse.command: echo '--- git state ---' && git status --short && git log --oneline -3
